overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival game showing a character with a bow traversing a snowy winter landscape. The character descends from a forested ridge, crosses a frozen river, and navigates through a rocky canyon passage in an atmospheric overcast setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy forest ridge with pine trees

events.description: character begins descending steep snowy slope from ridge

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously down a snowy hillside surrounded by tall pine trees, holding a bow ready

tall evergreen trees with snow-laden branches
tall evergreen trees with snow-laden branches
dark wrecked vehicle partially buried in snow
dense tree line stretching across the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character descends a snowy forest ridge surrounded by dense pine trees under an overcast sky. An abandoned vehicle sits partially buried in snow to the left as the character carefully navigates the slippery slope downward toward a distant frozen waterway.

scene_state.functional_zone: frozen river valley with rocky banks

events.description: character steps from snow onto frozen river surface
character slows pace while navigating slippery cracked ice

agents.ego_description: carefully walking across a frozen river with visible ice cracks, surveying the rocky banks ahead

entered.detail: cracked ice surface with snow dusting and visible dark water beneath
raised snow-covered river banks with exposed rock
raised snow-covered river banks with exposed rock
leafless tree standing on the river bank
large snow-dusted boulders lining the river edge
large snow-dusted boulders lining the river edge

segments.scene_description: The character transitions onto a frozen river, walking carefully across cracked ice surrounded by snow-covered banks and rock formations. The dense forest recedes into the background as the character approaches a narrow canyon entrance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon passage between high walls

events.description: character enters narrow rock canyon with high walls on both sides
character climbs over rock ledge while exiting canyon

agents.ego_description: navigating through a tight rocky passage, climbing over ledges and squeezing between canyon walls

entered.detail: tall sheer rock face with patches of snow and dry grass
tall sheer rock face with patches of snow and dry grass
constricted pathway between canyon walls with snow patches
layered rock formations creating natural steps
layered rock formations creating natural steps
brown grass tufts growing between rocks and snow

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow rocky canyon with high walls blocking the sky, navigating through a confined passage with snow patches and dry grass. The environment shifts from open river to enclosed stone corridor as the character climbs over rock ledges toward the forest exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest clearing with large boulders and rocky outcrops

events.description: character exits narrow canyon back into open forest area
character begins climbing up rocky incline

agents.ego_description: climbing over rocks and boulders while moving through a forest clearing, heading uphill

entered.detail: open area between trees with mixed snow and exposed ground
large scattered rock formations covered in snow
large scattered rock formations covered in snow
snow-dusted rocky ridges and climbing surfaces
snow-dusted rocky ridges and climbing surfaces

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the canyon, the character enters a wide forest clearing dotted with large boulders and rock outcroppings. The character climbs uphill over rocky terrain surrounded by tall pines, transitioning from the enclosed passage back to the open snowy wilderness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character traverses a winter wilderness, moving from a forested ridge through a restrictive canyon and back into an open landscape. It begins with a descent down a snowy slope past an abandoned vehicle and dense pine trees, heading toward a distant frozen waterway. As the character reaches the river, the forest recedes and the terrain opens up across cracked ice and snow-covered banks before narrowing into a confined rocky canyon. The scene then shifts from the open river to an enclosed stone corridor with high walls, where the character navigates snow patches and dry grass while climbing over rock ledges. Finally, the camera emerges from the canyon into a wide forest clearing, ascending over boulders and rocky terrain to return to the open snowy wilderness.
